Users are recommended to upgrade to Apache Airflow 3.1.8 or later, which resolves this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00409, "percentile": 0.32537}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8x34-9q3v-h7g8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-18T16:33:18Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8x34-9q3v-h7g8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8x34-9q3v-h7g8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-30911"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-17T11:16:11Z", "published_at": "2026-03-17T12:30:20Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-30911", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/62886", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/1rs2v7fcko2otl6n9ytthcj87cmsgx51", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/03/17/2", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow/PYSEC-2026-17.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8x34-9q3v-h7g8"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow", "summary": "Apache Airflow: Execution API HITL Endpoints Missing Per-Task Authorization", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T14:26:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8x34-9q3v-h7g8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.1.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.1.0, < 3.1.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow: Execution API HITL Endpoints Missing Per-Task Authorization
